🚀 Hiring AI/ML Engineers (LLMs) — Build Something Big in AI + Education

We’re working on an ambitious product in the AI + EdTech space — and looking for strong AI/ML engineers who want to build real, production-grade systems.

🧠 What You’ll Be Building

An AI-powered system that generates exam-quality questions (11+ / SAT level) across subjects like Maths, English, and Reasoning — designed for real-world deployment.

You’ll work on:

* LLM-based content generation
* Validation & quality pipelines
* Scalable APIs and structured outputs
* Solving real challenges in accuracy, consistency, and scale.

⚙️ What We’re Looking For

* Experience with LLMs / Generative AI
* Strong backend skills (Python / Node.js)
* Familiarity with embeddings / vector search
* Ability to build production-grade systems

💼 Role: Full-time / Contract

🌍 Remote (IST preferred)



📩 Apply: 

DM me or email: info@prakashai.co.in

👉 Detailed requirements will be shared with shortlisted candidates.

🚀 Hiring: AI Testing Specialist (Contract to Hire)

📍 Experience: 5+ Years
📄 Employment Type: Contract to Hire

• Design and execute test plans, test cases, and scenarios for AI systems
• Develop and enhance automated testing frameworks for AI components
• Ensure accuracy, reliability, and performance of AI solutions
• Perform benchmarking and performance evaluation of AI models
• Work on testing deep learning models and AI algorithms

• Strong proficiency in Python (data/image processing & automation)
• Experience with AI/ML frameworks like TensorFlow, Keras, or PyTorch
• Solid understanding of SDLC & STLC (AI-focused testing preferred)
• Hands-on experience in testing AI-driven applications

🎓 Qualifications:
• Bachelor’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Machine Learning, or related field
• Experience in AI testing / QA / deep learning

⭐ Good to Have:
• CI/CD pipelines for AI workflows
• Cloud platforms (AWS / Azure)
• Image processing & statistical analysis skills
